reconciled.rationale_completion: Both teachers' true measurements bracket 204s (gpt narrative says 204-205 before rounding to 200; claude says 208).

phase_timings.rationale: GPT-4o phase split is more credible — Claude appears to have defaulted suture_placement to a boilerplate ~62s under uncertainty (same value used in V6/V8/V10) and compressed throw phases to compensate.

penalties.rationale_closure: Disputed gap. Claude's frame description supports a real upper-portion non-approximation, but Claude over-calls gaps in this series. Conservative partial penalty rather than 0 or 8.

training_signal.claude_failure_mode: Defaults suture_placement to ~62s under low-confidence visibility, compressing other phases to fit total time.
training_signal.chatgpt_strength: More granular frame-by-frame phase tracing (frame numbers in the 100s-6000s range vs Claude's frame indices).
training_signal.chatgpt_weakness: Rounded completion time to 200.0 despite narrative indicating 204-205. Underestimates gap visibility from limited frame sampling.

notes: First teacher disagreement of significance in the series. The pattern (Claude over-penalizes by ~10pts, GPT-4o under-times by ~5s) is the kind of systematic bias the critique agent and consensus pipeline are designed to capture and correct.
